---
title: "Notebook 36: eIF4E IP Vehicle vs eIF3d Residuals"
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

## Load data

```{r load}
sig_df <- read_csv(here("output/34_sig_genes_residuals.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id))

features <- readRDS(here("output/predictive_modeling/feature_matrix_external_stability.rds")) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, eif4e_ip_vehicle_lfc, hia2026_dhx29_occupancy)

plot_df <- sig_df %>%
  inner_join(features, by = "gene_id_clean") %>%
  filter(!is.na(eif4e_ip_vehicle_lfc))

cat("Genes in plot:", nrow(plot_df), "\n")
```

## Correlation: residual vs eIF4E IP vehicle LFC

```{r correlation, fig.width=5, fig.height=4}
ct <- cor.test(plot_df$residual, plot_df$eif4e_ip_vehicle_lfc, method = "pearson")
label <- sprintf("r = %.2f, p = %.2e", ct$estimate, ct$p.value)

p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = residual, y = eif4e_ip_vehicle_lfc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.9, color = "grey40") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
           label = label, size = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Residual (hypoxia-specific eIF3d effect)",
    y = "eIF4E IP vehicle LFC"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

p

ggsave(here("output/36_eif4e_vehicle_vs_residual.pdf"), p, width = 5, height = 4)
```

```{r eif4e_quartile, fig.width=4, fig.height=4}
plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(residual_quartile = ntile(residual, 4) %>% factor(labels = c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4")))

p_q4e <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = residual_quartile, y = eif4e_ip_vehicle_lfc)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "grey80", trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Residual quartile (Q1 = normoxia-specific, Q4 = hypoxia-specific)",
    y = "eIF4E IP vehicle LFC"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

p_q4e

ggsave(here("output/36_eif4e_vehicle_by_quartile.pdf"), p_q4e, width = 4, height = 4)
```

## Correlation: residual vs DHX29 occupancy

```{r dhx29, fig.width=5, fig.height=4}
plot_df_dhx29 <- plot_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(hia2026_dhx29_occupancy)) %>%
  mutate(residual_quartile = ntile(residual, 4) %>% factor(labels = c("Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4")))

ct_dhx29 <- cor.test(plot_df_dhx29$residual, plot_df_dhx29$hia2026_dhx29_occupancy,
                     method = "pearson")
label_dhx29 <- sprintf("r = %.2f, p = %.2e", ct_dhx29$estimate, ct_dhx29$p.value)

p_dhx29 <- ggplot(plot_df_dhx29, aes(x = residual, y = hia2026_dhx29_occupancy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 0.9, color = "grey40") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5,
           label = label_dhx29, size = 3) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(quantile(plot_df_dhx29$residual, 0.01),
                           quantile(plot_df_dhx29$residual, 0.99))) +
  labs(
    x = "Residual (hypoxia-specific eIF3d effect)",
    y = "DHX29 occupancy"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

p_dhx29

ggsave(here("output/36_dhx29_vs_residual.pdf"), p_dhx29, width = 5, height = 4)
```

```{r dhx29_quartile, fig.width=4, fig.height=4}
p_qdhx <- ggplot(plot_df_dhx29, aes(x = residual_quartile, y = hia2026_dhx29_occupancy)) +
  geom_violin(fill = "grey80", trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, fill = "white", outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Residual quartile (Q1 = normoxia-specific, Q4 = hypoxia-specific)",
    y = "DHX29 occupancy"
  ) +
  theme_classic()

p_qdhx

ggsave(here("output/36_dhx29_by_quartile.pdf"), p_qdhx, width = 4, height = 4)
```
